                          AREA ||i._single_mode_frc_cfg||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _single_mode_frc_cfg PROC
;;;824    
;;;825    VOID _single_mode_frc_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;826    {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;827        //VIPSS instance
;;;828        gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][VIPSS1].b_is_dsc = g_dsc_enable[u8Dev];
000004  48fe              LDR      r0,|L3.1024|
000006  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000008  eb040184          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #2
00000c  eb011144          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #5
000010  4afc              LDR      r2,|L3.1028|
000012  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000016  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;829        gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][VIPSS1].u8_vipss_sel = VIPSS1;
000018  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00001a  eb040184          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #2
00001e  eb011144          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #5
000022  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000026  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
;;;830        _single_vipss_instance_init(u8Dev,&gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][VIPSS1]);
000028  eb040084          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #2
00002c  eb001044          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #5
000030  eb021100          ADD      r1,r2,r0,LSL #4
000034  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000036  f7fffffe          BL       _single_vipss_instance_init
;;;831    
;;;832        gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][VIPSS2].b_is_dsc = g_dsc_enable[u8Dev];
00003a  48f1              LDR      r0,|L3.1024|
00003c  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00003e  eb040184          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #2
000042  eb011144          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #5
000046  4aef              LDR      r2,|L3.1028|
000048  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
00004c  f8810094          STRB     r0,[r1,#0x94]
;;;833        gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][VIPSS2].u8_vipss_sel = VIPSS2;
000050  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000052  eb040084          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #2
000056  eb001044          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #5
00005a  eb021000          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #4
00005e  f8801095          STRB     r1,[r0,#0x95]
;;;834        _single_vipss_instance_init(u8Dev,&gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][VIPSS2]);
000062  eb040084          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #2
000066  eb001044          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #5
00006a  eb021000          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #4
00006e  f1000194          ADD      r1,r0,#0x94
000072  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000074  f7fffffe          BL       _single_vipss_instance_init
;;;835    
;;;836        gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][VIPSS3].b_is_dsc = g_dsc_enable[u8Dev];
000078  48e1              LDR      r0,|L3.1024|
00007a  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00007c  eb040184          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #2
000080  eb011144          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #5
000084  4adf              LDR      r2,|L3.1028|

                          AREA ||i._single_video_freeze||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _single_video_freeze PROC
;;;1034   
;;;1035   VOID _single_video_freeze(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_path_sel)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1036   {
000002  b086              SUB      sp,sp,#0x18
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;1037       BOOL b_vb_h;
;;;1038       DMA_COMMON_DEV_T st_dma_dev;
;;;1039       //video freeze
;;;1040       __disable_irq();
000008  b672              CPSID    i
;;;1041       if(g_dsc_enable[u8Dev])
00000a  4855              LDR      r0,|L4.352|
00000c  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00000e  b188              CBZ      r0,|L4.52|
;;;1042           gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][u8_path_sel].st_single_com_wdma_dev.u8_sel = g_u8_dma_dsc_idx[u8_path_sel];
000010  4854              LDR      r0,|L4.356|
000012  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
000014  eb040184          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #2
000018  eb011144          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #5
00001c  4a52              LDR      r2,|L4.360|
00001e  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000022  eb050285          ADD      r2,r5,r5,LSL #2
000026  eb021245          ADD      r2,r2,r5,LSL #5
00002a  eb010182          ADD      r1,r1,r2,LSL #2
00002e  f8810078          STRB     r0,[r1,#0x78]
000032  e010              B        |L4.86|
                  |L4.52|
;;;1043       else
;;;1044           gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][u8_path_sel].st_single_com_wdma_dev.u8_sel = g_u8_dma_idx[u8_path_sel];
000034  484d              LDR      r0,|L4.364|
000036  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
000038  eb040184          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #2
00003c  eb011144          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #5
000040  4a49              LDR      r2,|L4.360|
000042  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000046  eb050285          ADD      r2,r5,r5,LSL #2

                  |L4.86|
;;;1045       gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][u8_path_sel].st_single_com_wdma_dev.st_frc_cfg.u8_src_buf_id_mode = DMA_BUF_SWITCH_MANU;
000056  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000058  eb040084          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #2

000076  eb040084          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #2
00007a  eb001044          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #5

                          AREA ||i._single_vipss_instance_init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _single_vipss_instance_init PROC
;;;21     
;;;22     static VOID _single_vipss_instance_init(UINT8 u8Dev,SINGLE_VIPSS_T *pst_single_vipss_dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;23     {
000002  4606              MOV      r6,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;24         UINT8 u8_path_sel = pst_single_vipss_dev->u8_vipss_sel;

;;;25

;;;27     
;;;28         if(pst_single_vipss_dev->b_is_dsc)

000016  b1e8              CBZ      r0,|L7.84|
;;;29         {
;;;30             gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][u8_path_sel].st_single_vwdma_dev.u8_sel = g_u8_dma_dsc_idx[u8_path_sel];
000018  4827              LDR      r0,|L7.184|
00001a  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
00001c  eb060186          ADD      r1,r6,r6,LSL #2

                          AREA ||i._single_vopss_instance_init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _single_vopss_instance_init PROC
;;;410    
;;;411    static VOID _single_vopss_instance_init(UINT8 u8Dev,SINGLE_VOPSS_T *pst_single_vopss_dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;412    {
000002  4606              MOV      r6,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;413        UINT8 u8_path_sel = pst_single_vopss_dev->u8_vopss_sel;
000006  7865              LDRB     r5,[r4,#1]
;;;414    
;;;415        if(pst_single_vopss_dev->b_is_dsc)
000008  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]
00000a  b190              CBZ      r0,|L9.50|
;;;416        {
;;;417            api_vrdma_instance_init(&pst_single_vopss_dev->st_single_vrdma_dev, g_u8_dma_dsc_idx[u8_path_sel]);
00000c  4810              LDR      r0,|L9.80|
00000e  5d41              LDRB     r1,[r0,r5]
000010  f1040014          ADD      r0,r4,#0x14
000014  f7fffffe          BL       api_vrdma_instance_init
;;;418            api_su_instance_init(&pst_single_vopss_dev->st_single_su_dev, g_u8_su_dsc_idx[u8_path_sel]);
000018  480e              LDR      r0,|L9.84|
00001a  5d41              LDRB     r1,[r0,r5]
00001c  f1040044          ADD      r0,r4,#0x44
000020  f7fffffe          BL       api_su_instance_init
;;;419            api_dsc_decoder_instance_init(&pst_single_vopss_dev->st_decoder_dev,g_u8_dsc_idx[u8_path_sel]);
000024  480c              LDR      r0,|L9.88|
000026  5d41              LDRB     r1,[r0,r5]
000028  f1040030          ADD      r0,r4,#0x30
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       api_dsc_decoder_instance_init
000030  e00b              B        |L9.74|
                  |L9.50|
;;;420        }
;;;421        else
;;;422        {
;;;423            api_vrdma_instance_init(&pst_single_vopss_dev->st_single_vrdma_dev, g_u8_dma_idx[u8_path_sel]);

;;;426        u8Dev = u8Dev;

00004c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;428

                          AREA ||i._video_freeze||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _video_freeze PROC
;;;1470   
;;;1471   VOID _video_freeze(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_path)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;1472   {
000002  b091              SUB      sp,sp,#0x44
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1473       BOOL b_vb_h;
;;;1474       DMA_COMMON_DEV_T st_dma_dev[4];
;;;1475       UINT8 i;
;;;1476   
;;;1477       //video freeze
;;;1478       __disable_irq();
000008  b672              CPSID    i
;;;1479   
;;;1480       for(i=0;i<4;i++)
00000a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00000c  e06c              B        |L10.232|
                  |L10.14|
;;;1481       {
;;;1482           if(u8_path&(1<<i))
00000e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000010  40a0              LSLS     r0,r0,r4
000012  4030              ANDS     r0,r0,r6
000014  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000016  d065              BEQ      |L10.228|
;;;1483           {
;;;1484               if(g_dsc_enable[u8Dev])
000018  486c              LDR      r0,|L10.460|
00001a  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
00001c  b188              CBZ      r0,|L10.66|
;;;1485                   gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][i].st_single_com_wdma_dev.u8_sel = g_u8_dma_dsc_idx[i];
00001e  486c              LDR      r0,|L10.464|
000020  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000022  eb050185          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #2
000026  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
00002a  4a6a              LDR      r2,|L10.468|
00002c  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000030  eb040284          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #2
000034  eb021244          ADD      r2,r2,r4,LSL #5
000038  eb010182          ADD      r1,r1,r2,LSL #2
00003c  f8810078          STRB     r0,[r1,#0x78]
000040  e010              B        |L10.100|
                  |L10.66|
;;;1486               else
;;;1487                   gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][i].st_single_com_wdma_dev.u8_sel = g_u8_dma_idx[i];
000042  4865              LDR      r0,|L10.472|

000142  4008              ANDS     r0,r0,r1
000144  b1f8              CBZ      r0,|L11.390|
;;;1601               {
;;;1602                   g_u16_timer_out = 0;
000146  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000148  494b              LDR      r1,|L11.632|
00014a  8008              STRH     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;1603                   do
00014c  bf00              NOP      
                  |L11.334|
;;;1604                   {
;;;1605                       g_u16_timer_out ++;
00014e  484a              LDR      r0,|L11.632|
000150  8800              LDRH     r0,[r0,#0]  ; g_u16_timer_out
000152  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000154  4948              LDR      r1,|L11.632|
000156  8008              STRH     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;1606                       if(g_dsc_enable[u8StartDev+j])

00015a  4943              LDR      r1,|L11.616|

                  |L11.364|

000170  f7fffffe          BL       api_misc_vb_status_get
000174  4682              MOV      r10,r0
                  |L11.374|
;;;1610                   }
;;;1611                   while(b_vb_h == MS_FALSE && (g_u16_timer_out < 500));
000176  f1ba0f00          CMP      r10,#0
00017a  d104              BNE      |L11.390|
00017c  483e              LDR      r0,|L11.632|
00017e  8800              LDRH     r0,[r0,#0]  ; g_u16_timer_out
000180  f5b07ffa          CMP      r0,#0x1f4
000184  dbe3              BLT      |L11.334|
                  |L11.390|

000188  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1598
                  |L11.394|
00018a  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;1598
00018c  dbd6              BLT      |L11.316|

                  |L11.402|
000192  4545              CMP      r5,r8                 ;1594
000194  dbc7              BLT      |L11.294|
;;;1612               }
;;;1613           }
;;;1614       }
;;;1615   
;;;1616       for(j=0;j<u8_num;j++)
000196  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000198  e059              B        |L11.590|
                  |L11.410|
;;;1617       {

;;;1620           for(i=0;i<4;i++)
0001ac  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
0001ae  e04a              B        |L11.582|
                  |L11.432|
;;;1621           {
;;;1622               if(pu8_path[j]&(1<<i))

0001b6  4008              ANDS     r0,r0,r1

;;;1623               {

0001be  4a31              LDR      r2,|L11.644|
0001c0  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
0001c4  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]
;;;1625                   api_dma_common_buf_id_get(&st_dma_dev[i]);
0001c6  eb041104          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #4
0001ca  aa01              ADD      r2,sp,#4
0001cc  1888              ADDS     r0,r1,r2
0001ce  f7fffffe          BL       api_dma_common_buf_id_get
;;;1626                   u8_wdma_buf_id[u8StartDev+j] = st_dma_dev[i].st_dma_status.u8_wdma_buf_id;

0001d6  a901              ADD      r1,sp,#4

0001e6  a901              ADD      r1,sp,#4

0001f4  4611              MOV      r1,r2

000206  4a20              LDR      r2,|L11.648|

00020c  4611              MOV      r1,r2

000218  71c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#7]

000224  4410              ADD      r0,r0,r2
000226  7201              STRB     r1,[r0,#8]

00022c  1888              ADDS     r0,r1,r2

;;;1632                   api_dma_common_trigger(&st_dma_dev[i]);

000236  e000              B        |L11.570|
                  |L11.568|

                  |L11.570|

                  |L11.578|

000244  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1620
                  |L11.582|

000248  dbb2              BLT      |L11.432|

                  |L11.590|
00024e  4545              CMP      r5,r8                 ;1616
000250  dba3              BLT      |L11.410|
;;;1633               }
;;;1634           }
;;;1635       }
;;;1636       __enable_irq();
000252  b662              CPSIE    i
;;;1637   }
000254  b012              ADD      sp,sp,#0x48
000256  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;1638   
                          ENDP

00025a  0000              DCW      0x0000

                          AREA ||i._video_freeze_out||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _video_freeze_out PROC
;;;1533   
;;;1534   VOID _video_freeze_out(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_path)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1535   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1536       UINT8 i;
;;;1537       //video freeze
;;;1538       __disable_irq();
000006  b672              CPSID    i
;;;1539       for(i=0;i<4;i++)
000008  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00000a  e062              B        |L12.210|
                  |L12.12|
;;;1540       {
;;;1541           if(u8_path&(1<<i))
00000c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000e  40a0              LSLS     r0,r0,r4
000010  4030              ANDS     r0,r0,r6
000012  b3e8              CBZ      r0,|L12.144|
;;;1542           {
;;;1543               if(g_dsc_enable[u8Dev])
000014  4832              LDR      r0,|L12.224|
000016  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
000018  b188              CBZ      r0,|L12.62|
;;;1544                   gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][i].st_single_com_wdma_dev.u8_sel = g_u8_dma_dsc_idx[i];
00001a  4832              LDR      r0,|L12.228|
00001c  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00001e  eb050185          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #2
000022  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
000026  4a30              LDR      r2,|L12.232|
000028  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
00002c  eb040284          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #2
000030  eb021244          ADD      r2,r2,r4,LSL #5
000034  eb010182          ADD      r1,r1,r2,LSL #2
000038  f8810078          STRB     r0,[r1,#0x78]
00003c  e010              B        |L12.96|
                  |L12.62|
;;;1545               else
;;;1546                   gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][i].st_single_com_wdma_dev.u8_sel = g_u8_dma_idx[i];
00003e  482b              LDR      r0,|L12.236|
000040  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000042  eb050185          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #2
000046  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
00004a  4a27              LDR      r2,|L12.232|
00004c  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000050  eb040284          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #2
000054  eb021244          ADD      r2,r2,r4,LSL #5
000058  eb010182          ADD      r1,r1,r2,LSL #2
00005c  f8810078          STRB     r0,[r1,#0x78]
                  |L12.96|
;;;1547               gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][i].st_single_com_wdma_dev.st_frc_cfg.u8_src_buf_id_mode = DMA_BUF_SWITCH_MANU;
000060  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000062  eb050085          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #2
000066  eb001045          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #5
00006a  4a1f              LDR      r2,|L12.232|
00006c  eb021000          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #4
000070  eb040284          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #2
000074  eb021244          ADD      r2,r2,r4,LSL #5
000078  eb000082          ADD      r0,r0,r2,LSL #2
00007c  f880107d          STRB     r1,[r0,#0x7d]
;;;1548               gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][i].st_single_com_wdma_dev.st_frc_cfg.u8_dst_buf_id_mode = DMA_BUF_SWITCH_MANU;
000080  eb050085          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #2
000084  eb001045          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #5
000088  4a17              LDR      r2,|L12.232|
00008a  eb021000          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #4
00008e  e000              B        |L12.146|
                  |L12.144|
000090  e01d              B        |L12.206|
                  |L12.146|
000092  eb040284          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #2
000096  eb021244          ADD      r2,r2,r4,LSL #5
00009a  eb000082          ADD      r0,r0,r2,LSL #2
00009e  f880107e          STRB     r1,[r0,#0x7e]
;;;1549   
;;;1550               api_dma_comom_buf_id_mode_cfg(&gst_single_vipss_dev[u8Dev][i].st_single_com_wdma_dev);
0000a2  eb050185          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #2
0000a6  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
0000aa  4a0f              LDR      r2,|L12.232|
0000ac  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
0000b0  eb040284          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #2
0000b4  eb021244          ADD      r2,r2,r4,LSL #5
0000b8  eb010182          ADD      r1,r1,r2,LSL #2
0000bc  f1010078          ADD      r0,r1,#0x78
0000c0  f7fffffe          BL       api_dma_comom_buf_id_mode_cfg
;;;1551   //            api_hdmi_tx_audio_mute(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][i],MS_TRUE);
;;;1552   			b_freeze_status[u8Dev][i] = TRUE;
0000c4  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0000c6  490a              LDR      r1,|L12.240|
0000c8  eb010185          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #2
0000cc  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]
                  |L12.206|
0000ce  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1539
0000d0  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1539
                  |L12.210|
0000d2  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;1539
0000d4  db9a              BLT      |L12.12|
;;;1553   		}
;;;1554   	}
;;;1555   	api_dma_common_simultaneous_trigger();
0000d6  f7fffffe          BL       api_dma_common_simultaneous_trigger
;;;1556       __enable_irq();
0000da  b662              CPSIE    i
;;;1557   }
0000dc  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1558   
                          ENDP

0000de  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L12.224|
                          DCD      g_dsc_enable
                  |L12.228|
                          DCD      g_u8_dma_dsc_idx
                  |L12.232|
                          DCD      gst_single_vipss_dev
                  |L12.236|
                          DCD      g_u8_dma_idx
                  |L12.240|

                          AREA ||i._video_unfreeze||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _video_unfreeze PROC
;;;1638   
;;;1639   VOID _video_unfreeze(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_path)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;1640   {
000002  b099              SUB      sp,sp,#0x64
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1641       UINT8 i;
;;;1642       BOOL b_int;
;;;1643       DMA_COMMON_DEV_T st_dma_dev[4];
;;;1644       SS_DEV_T st_vopss_ss_dev[4];
;;;1645   
;;;1646       for(i=0;i<4;i++)
000008  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00000a  e024              B        |L13.86|
                  |L13.12|
;;;1647       {
;;;1648           if(u8_path&(1<<i))
00000c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000e  40a0              LSLS     r0,r0,r4
000010  4030              ANDS     r0,r0,r6
000012  b1f0              CBZ      r0,|L13.82|
;;;1649           {
;;;1650               if(g_dsc_enable[u8Dev])
000014  48b1              LDR      r0,|L13.732|
000016  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
000018  b120              CBZ      r0,|L13.36|
;;;1651                   st_vopss_ss_dev[i].u8_sel = g_u8_ss_ch_dsc_idx[i];
00001a  48b1              LDR      r0,|L13.736|
00001c  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00001e  f80d0034          STRB     r0,[sp,r4,LSL #3]
000022  e003              B        |L13.44|
                  |L13.36|
;;;1652               else
;;;1653                   st_vopss_ss_dev[i].u8_sel = g_u8_ss_ch_idx[i];
000024  48af              LDR      r0,|L13.740|
000026  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000028  f80d0034          STRB     r0,[sp,r4,LSL #3]
                  |L13.44|
;;;1654               st_vopss_ss_dev[i].st_vopss_trigger_mode.u8_trigger_mode = NEXT_VB_RISING_EDGE_TRIGGER;
00002c  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
00002e  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000030  eb0000c4          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #3
000034  71c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#7]
;;;1655               st_vopss_ss_dev[i].st_vopss_trigger_mode.u8_trigger_sel = TRIGGER_BY_VOPSS_TRIGGER;
000036  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000038  4669              MOV      r1,sp
00003a  eb0101c4          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #3
00003e  7148              STRB     r0,[r1,#5]
;;;1656               st_vopss_ss_dev[i].st_vopss_trigger_mode.u8_trigger_tmg = VDS_TMG1 + i;
000040  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000042  eb0000c4          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #3
000046  7184              STRB     r4,[r0,#6]
;;;1657   
;;;1658               api_ss_vopss_trig_mode_cfg(&st_vopss_ss_dev[i]);
000048  4669              MOV      r1,sp
00004a  eb0100c4          ADD      r0,r1,r4,LSL #3
00004e  f7fffffe          BL       api_ss_vopss_trig_mode_cfg
                  |L13.82|
000052  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1646
000054  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1646
                  |L13.86|
000056  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;1646
000058  dbd8              BLT      |L13.12|
;;;1659           }
;;;1660       }
;;;1661       __disable_irq();
00005a  b672              CPSID    i
;;;1662   
;;;1663       for(i=0;i<4;i++)
00005c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00005e  e064              B        |L13.298|
                  |L13.96|
;;;1664       {
;;;1665           if(u8_path&(1<<i))
000060  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000062  40a0              LSLS     r0,r0,r4
000064  4030              ANDS     r0,r0,r6
000066  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000068  d05d              BEQ      |L13.294|
;;;1666           {
;;;1667               if(g_dsc_enable[u8Dev])
00006a  489c              LDR      r0,|L13.732|
00006c  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
00006e  b130              CBZ      r0,|L13.126|
;;;1668                   st_dma_dev[i].u8_sel = g_u8_dma_dsc_idx[i];
000070  489d              LDR      r0,|L13.744|
000072  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000074  eb041104          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #4
000078  aa08              ADD      r2,sp,#0x20
00007a  5450              STRB     r0,[r2,r1]
00007c  e005              B        |L13.138|
                  |L13.126|
;;;1669               else
;;;1670                   st_dma_dev[i].u8_sel = g_u8_dma_idx[i];
00007e  489b              LDR      r0,|L13.748|
000080  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000082  eb041104          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #4
000086  aa08              ADD      r2,sp,#0x20
000088  5450              STRB     r0,[r2,r1]
                  |L13.138|
;;;1671               api_dma_common_fifo_status_get(&st_dma_dev[i]);

                          AREA ||i.app_single_osd_init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_single_osd_init PROC
;;;1371   
;;;1372   VOID app_single_osd_init(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1373   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;1374       UINT8 u8_idx = 0;
000004  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1375       for(u8_idx = 0; u8_idx < 4; u8_idx ++)
000006  bf00              NOP      
000008  e02c              B        |L20.100|
                  |L20.10|
;;;1376       {
;;;1377           g_st_misc_osd_mux[u8Dev][u8_idx].b_enable = MS_TRUE;
00000a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1

                          AREA ||i.app_single_process||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_single_process PROC
;;;1326   
;;;1327   VOID app_single_process(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_rx_idx)
000000  b57c              PUSH     {r2-r6,lr}
;;;1328   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1329       if(g_bSplitterEnable[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx])
000006  4840              LDR      r0,|L22.264|
000008  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
00000c  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00000e  b120              CBZ      r0,|L22.26|
;;;1330       {
;;;1331           app_single_user_splitter_process(u8Dev,u8_rx_idx);
000010  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000012  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000014  f7fffffe          BL       app_single_user_splitter_process
000018  e075              B        |L22.262|
                  |L22.26|
;;;1332       }
;;;1333       else
;;;1334       {
;;;1335           UINT8 b_int = 0;
00001a  2600              MOVS     r6,#0

00003e  eb010241          ADD      r2,r1,r1,LSL #1

000066  8141              STRH     r1,[r0,#0xa]
;;;2814       g_st_single_app_dev[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx].st_scale_size.tInSize.u16_v = g_stVideo_HDMIRx_Timing[u8Dev][Vipss_Mapping_Rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx]].u16_vactive;

                          AREA ||i.app_single_vipss_rx_mux_cfg||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_single_vipss_rx_mux_cfg PROC
;;;2360   #if 1
;;;2361   static VOID app_single_vipss_rx_mux_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_vipss_sel, SINGLE_APP_T *pst_app_single_dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;2362   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000006  4616              MOV      r6,r2

;;;2447                   case 576:
;;;2448                       //vipss mux config
;;;2449                       api_misc_vipss_mux_cfg(u8_vipss_sel, MISC_VIPSS_MUXTYPE_8);       //< CSC ->DEINT-> SDN -> VWDMA1
;;;2450                       //vipss rx deint config
;;;2451                       g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev].b_yuv444 = MS_TRUE;
;;;2452                       g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev].b_deint_en = MS_TRUE;
;;;2453                       g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev].u16_vactive = 576;
;;;2454                       g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev].b_hd_full_mode = MS_FALSE;
;;;2455                       g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev].u32_buff0_start_addr = 0;
;;;2456                       g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev].u32_buff1_start_addr = 4000000;
;;;2457                       api_deint_init(&g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev]);
;;;2458                       api_deint_config(&g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev]);
;;;2459                       g_stVideo_HDMIRx_Timing[u8Dev][pst_app_single_dev->u8_single_mode].u16_hactive = g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][pst_app_single_dev->u8_single_mode].st_rx_video_timing.u16_hactive/2;
;;;2460                       g_stVideo_HDMIRx_Timing[u8Dev][pst_app_single_dev->u8_single_mode].u16_vactive = 576;
;;;2461                       break;
;;;2462                   default:
;;;2463                       g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev].b_deint_en = MS_FALSE;
;;;2464                       api_deint_config(&g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev]);
;;;2465                       //vipss mux config
;;;2466                       api_misc_vipss_mux_cfg(u8_vipss_sel, MISC_VIPSS_MUXTYPE_4);       //< CSC -> SDN -> VWDMA1
;;;2467                       break;
;;;2468               }
;;;2469           }
;;;2470           else
;;;2471   #endif
;;;2472           {
;;;2473               if(g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_vipss_sel].st_rx_video_timing.u8_polarity % 2 == 0)

0002dc  eb010141          ADD      r1,r1,r1,LSL #1

0002fa  1049              ASRS     r1,r1,#1

000300  bbf1              CBNZ     r1,|L27.896|
;;;2474               {
;;;2475                   g_st_deint_dev[u8Dev].b_deint_en = MS_FALSE;

000312  f7fffffe          BL       api_deint_config
;;;2477                   g_stVideo_HDMIRx_Timing[u8Dev][u8_vipss_sel].u16_hactive = g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_vipss_sel].st_rx_video_timing.u16_hactive;

                  app_single_win_cfg PROC
;;;2240   #if 1
;;;2241   void app_single_win_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,stMs1826Wincfg_T* pstMs1826WinCfg,BOOL bUpdate)
000000  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;2242   {
000004  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000008  460e              MOV      r6,r1
00000a  4617              MOV      r7,r2
;;;2243       UINT8 u8Rx  = pstMs1826WinCfg->u8Rx;
00000c  f8968000          LDRB     r8,[r6,#0]
;;;2244       UINT8 u8Tx  = pstMs1826WinCfg->u8Tx;
000010  7875              LDRB     r5,[r6,#1]
;;;2245       UINT16 u16X = pstMs1826WinCfg->u16X;
000012  8870              LDRH     r0,[r6,#2]
000014  9004              STR      r0,[sp,#0x10]
;;;2246       UINT16 u16Y = pstMs1826WinCfg->u16Y;
000016  f8b69004          LDRH     r9,[r6,#4]
;;;2247       UINT16 u16W = pstMs1826WinCfg->u16W;
00001a  f8b6a006          LDRH     r10,[r6,#6]
;;;2248       UINT16 u16H = pstMs1826WinCfg->u16H;
00001e  f8b6b008          LDRH     r11,[r6,#8]
;;;2249   //    u8 l_u8VIC = g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8Tx].st_infoframes_packets.st_avi_infoframe.u8_video_code;
;;;2250   //	MISC_MODULE_CLK_T st_module_clk;
;;;2251   
;;;2252       g_st_single_app_dev[u8Dev][u8Tx].st_win_size.u16_xpos = u16X;
000022  eb040144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #1
000026  eb0101c4          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #3
00002a  4a38              LDR      r2,|L30.268|
00002c  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000030  eb050245          ADD      r2,r5,r5,LSL #1
000034  eb0202c5          ADD      r2,r2,r5,LSL #3
000038  eb010182          ADD      r1,r1,r2,LSL #2
00003c  9804              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x10]
00003e  8048              STRH     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;2253       g_st_single_app_dev[u8Dev][u8Tx].st_win_size.u16_ypos = u16Y;
000040  eb040044          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #1
000044  eb0000c4          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #3
000048  4930              LDR      r1,|L30.268|
00004a  eb011000          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #4
00004e  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000052  eb0101c5          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #3
000056  eb000081          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #2
00005a  f8a09004          STRH     r9,[r0,#4]
;;;2254       g_st_single_app_dev[u8Dev][u8Tx].st_win_size.u16_width = u16W;
00005e  eb040044          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #1
000062  eb0000c4          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #3
000066  4929              LDR      r1,|L30.268|
000068  eb011000          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #4
00006c  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000070  eb0101c5          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #3
000074  eb000081          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #2
000078  f8a0a006          STRH     r10,[r0,#6]
;;;2255       g_st_single_app_dev[u8Dev][u8Tx].st_win_size.u16_hight = u16H;
00007c  eb040044          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #1
000080  eb0000c4          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #3
000084  4921              LDR      r1,|L30.268|
000086  eb011000          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #4
00008a  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
00008e  eb0101c5          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #3
000092  eb000081          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #2
000096  f8a0b008          STRH     r11,[r0,#8]
;;;2256   
;;;2257   //    mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval(0xb6,0x4004 + u8Tx * 0x100, 0x00);    // freerun lock
;;;2258   //    mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval(0xb6,0x4004 + u8Tx * 0x100, 0x11);    // once lock
;;;2259       _single_video_freeze(u8Dev,u8Tx);
00009a  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00009c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00009e  f7fffffe          BL       _single_video_freeze
;;;2260       Vipss_Mapping_Rx[u8Dev][u8Tx] = u8Rx;
0000a2  481b              LDR      r0,|L30.272|
0000a4  eb000084          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #2
0000a8  f8008005          STRB     r8,[r0,r5]
;;;2261       _single_vipss_cfg(u8Dev,g_dsc_enable[u8Dev],u8Tx);

0000ae  5d01              LDRB     r1,[r0,r4]
0000b0  462a              MOV      r2,r5
0000b2  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0000b4  f7fffffe          BL       _single_vipss_cfg
;;;2262       app_video_vipss_trig(u8Dev,g_dsc_enable[u8Dev]?g_u8_ss_ch_dsc_idx[u8Tx]:g_u8_ss_ch_idx[u8Tx]);
0000b8  4816              LDR      r0,|L30.276|
0000ba  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
0000bc  b110              CBZ      r0,|L30.196|

0000c0  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]

                  |L30.196|

                  |L30.200|

0000ca  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0000cc  f7fffffe          BL       app_video_vipss_trig
;;;2263       _single_vopss_cfg(u8Dev,g_dsc_enable[u8Dev],u8Tx);
0000d0  4810              LDR      r0,|L30.276|

0000d8  f7fffffe          BL       _single_vopss_cfg
;;;2264

0000ee  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0000f0  f7fffffe          BL       _single_video_unfreeze
;;;2269   
;;;2270       LOG("[INFO] app_single_win_cfg rx[%d] tx[%d] x[%d] y[%d] w[%d] h[%d] update[%d]\r\n",u8Rx,u8Tx,u16X,u16Y,u16W,u16H,bUpdate);
0000f4  e88d0e00          STM      sp,{r9-r11}

0000fc  4641              MOV      r1,r8

;;;2271   }
000106  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000108  e8bd8ff0          POP      {r4-r11,pc}
;;;2272

;;;2548   //        g_st_tx_mux[u8Dev][2].u8_video_mux = MISC_VIDEO_MODULE_MIX1;

                          AREA ||i.single_video_mute||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  single_video_mute PROC
;;;992    
;;;993    VOID single_video_mute(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_path, BOOL b_mute)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;994    {
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
;;;995        BOOL b_int;
;;;996        MISC_RXPATTERN_T gst_pattern;
;;;997    //    LOG("single_video_mute TX%d mute sta:%s\r\n",u8_path,b_mute?"TRUE":"FALSE");
;;;998        gst_single_vopss_dev[u8Dev][u8_path].st_single_su_dev.u8_sel = g_dsc_enable[u8Dev] ? g_u8_su_dsc_idx[u8_path]: g_u8_su_idx[u8_path];
00000a  485d              LDR      r0,|L35.384|
00000c  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
00000e  b110              CBZ      r0,|L35.22|
000010  485c              LDR      r0,|L35.388|
000012  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000014  e001              B        |L35.26|
                  |L35.22|
000016  485c              LDR      r0,|L35.392|
000018  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
                  |L35.26|
00001a  ebc51105          RSB      r1,r5,r5,LSL #4
00001e  4a5b              LDR      r2,|L35.396|
000020  eb021141          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #5
000024  ebc41204          RSB      r2,r4,r4,LSL #4
000028  eb0101c2          ADD      r1,r1,r2,LSL #3
00002c  f8810044          STRB     r0,[r1,#0x44]
;;;999        gst_single_vopss_dev[u8Dev][u8_path].st_single_su_dev.st_video_border.bd_enable = b_mute;
000030  ebc51005          RSB      r0,r5,r5,LSL #4
000034  4955              LDR      r1,|L35.396|
000036  eb011040          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #5
00003a  ebc41104          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #4
00003e  eb0000c1          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #3
000042  f8807064          STRB     r7,[r0,#0x64]
;;;1000
